name: Nagatanien Holdings Co.,Ltd.
summary: Nagatanien Holdings Co.,Ltd. manufactures and distributes instant food products in Japan and internationally. It offers manufacture and sell food and drink. The company was formerly known as Nagatanien Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Nagatanien Holdings Co.,Ltd. in October 2015. Nagatanien Holdings Co.,Ltd. was incorporated in 1947 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
